entries.text: Completed full ATS evaluation: CEIPAL vs Bullhorn vs JobDiva vs custom build + Loxo (AI-native challenger).
- **Stay on CEIPAL short-term** — API is live, migration cost isn't worth it yet
- **Loxo Professional** is the strongest candidate if Mike wants to migrate — AI-native, has NL search for database mining, Outreach automation replaces Philippines manual email workflow
- **Bullhorn Amplify** is technically impressive (AI agents) but Mike left for good reason — pricing + lock-in will be worse now
- **JobDiva** is a lateral move — high switching cost, no meaningful AI improvement
- **Custom ATS** is Mike's dream but wrong timing at $20M — better to build AI layer ON TOP of CEIPAL via existing API for 10% of the cost
- **Fastest wins don't require ATS migration:** RingCentral call monitoring AI, CEIPAL candidate recycling engine, outreach automation
- 04:40 PDT — Heartbeat ran. Mike asleep. Disk 21% (45G free). No pending messages.
